briefdescription.para: XV_letterbox_CfgInitialize - Initializes a specific XV_letterbox instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function sets up the XV_letterbox instance pointed to by InstancePtr using the configuration provided in ConfigPtr and the specified base address EffectiveAddr. It asserts that all input pointers are valid, copies the configuration, updates the base address, and marks the instance as ready.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XV_letterbox instance to be initialized.
Pointer to the configuration structure for the instance.
Base address to be used for the hardware instance.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if initialization is successful.

briefdescription.para: XV_letterbox_Start - Starts the XV_letterbox hardware core.

detaileddescription.para: This function asserts that the provided InstancePtr is not NULL and that the hardware component is ready. It then reads the current control register value, preserves the auto-restart bit, and sets the start bit to initiate the hardware operation.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XV_letterbox instance to be started.

simplesect.para: This function does not return a value.

briefdescription.para: XV_letterbox_IsDone - Checks if the XV_letterbox hardware core has finished processing.

detaileddescription.para: This function asserts that the provided InstancePtr is not NULL and that the hardware component is ready. It reads the control register and checks the 'done' bit to determine if the hardware operation is complete.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XV_letterbox instance to be checked.

simplesect.para: 1 if the operation is done, 0 otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Checks if the XV_letterbox hardware core is idle.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads the control register of the XV_letterbox instance to determine if the hardware is currently idle. It asserts that the instance pointer is not NULL and that the instance is ready before accessing the hardware register.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_letterbox instance.

simplesect.para: 1 if the hardware is idle, 0 otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Checks if the XV_letterbox hardware core is ready to accept new input.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads the control register of the XV_letterbox instance to determine if the hardware core is ready for the next operation. It asserts that the instance pointer is not NULL and that the instance is marked as ready. The function returns a non-zero value if the core is ready, and zero otherwise.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_letterbox instance.

simplesect.para: 1 if the hardware core is ready for new input, 0 otherwise.

briefdescription.para: XV_letterbox_EnableAutoRestart - Enables auto-restart for the XV_letterbox hardware core.

detaileddescription.para: This function asserts that the provided InstancePtr is not NULL and that the hardware component is ready. It writes to the control register to enable the auto-restart feature, allowing the hardware to automatically restart processing after completion without software intervention.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XV_letterbox instance.

simplesect.para: This function does not return a value.

briefdescription.para: XV_letterbox_DisableAutoRestart - Disables auto-restart for the XV_letterbox hardware core.

detaileddescription.para: This function asserts that the provided InstancePtr is not NULL and that the hardware component is ready. It writes to the control register to disable the auto-restart feature, so the hardware will not automatically restart after completion.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XV_letterbox instance.

simplesect.para: This function does not return a value.

briefdescription.para: Sets the hardware register value for the width parameter of the XV_letterbox instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function writes the specified width value to the hardware register associated with the XV_letterbox core. It first asserts that the instance pointer is not NULL and that the instance is ready before performing the register write.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XV_letterbox instance.
The width value to be written to the hardware register.

simplesect.para: None.

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the value of the HWREG_WIDTH hardware register from the XV_letterbox instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads the current width configuration from the hardware register associated with the XV_letterbox peripheral.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_letterbox instance. It must be a valid pointer to an initialized XV_letterbox structure.

simplesect.para: The value of the HWREG_WIDTH register as a 32-bit unsigned integer.
The function asserts that InstancePtr is not NULL and that the instance is ready before accessing the hardware register.

briefdescription.para: Sets the hardware register value for the height parameter of the XV_letterbox instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function writes the specified height value to the hardware register associated with the XV_letterbox core. It first asserts that the instance pointer is not NULL and that the instance is ready before performing the register write.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XV_letterbox instance.
The height value to be written to the hardware register.

simplesect.para: None.

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the value of the HWREG_HEIGHT hardware register from the XV_letterbox instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads the current height configuration from the hardware register associated with the XV_letterbox peripheral.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_letterbox instance. It must be a valid pointer to an initialized XV_letterbox structure.

simplesect.para: The value of the HWREG_HEIGHT register as a 32-bit unsigned integer.
The function asserts that InstancePtr is not NULL and that the instance is ready before accessing the hardware register.

briefdescription.para: Sets the hardware register for the video format in the XV_letterbox instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function writes the specified video format data to the hardware register associated with the XV_letterbox instance. It first asserts that the instance pointer is not NULL and that the instance is ready before performing the write operation.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XV_letterbox instance.
The video format data to be written to the hardware register.

simplesect.para: None.

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the current hardware register value for the video format from the XV_letterbox instance.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_letterbox instance.

simplesect.para: The value of the HWREG_VIDEO_FORMAT register.
The function asserts that the instance pointer is not NULL and that the hardware is ready.

briefdescription.para: Sets the hardware register value for the column start parameter of the XV_letterbox instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function writes the specified column start value to the hardware register associated with the XV_letterbox core. It first asserts that the instance pointer is not NULL and that the instance is ready before performing the register write.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XV_letterbox instance.
The column start value to be written to the hardware register.

simplesect.para: None.

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the value of the HWREG_COL_START hardware register from the XV_letterbox instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads the current column start configuration from the hardware register associated with the XV_letterbox peripheral.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_letterbox instance. It must be a valid pointer to an initialized XV_letterbox structure.

simplesect.para: The value of the HWREG_COL_START register as a 32-bit unsigned integer.
The function asserts that InstancePtr is not NULL and that the instance is ready before accessing the hardware register.

briefdescription.para: XV_letterbox_Set_HwReg_col_end - Sets the hardware register value for the column end parameter in the XV_letterbox instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function writes the specified data value to the HWREG_COL_END register of the letterbox hardware, using the base address from the instance configuration. It first asserts that the instance pointer is not NULL and that the instance is ready before performing the register write operation.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XV_letterbox instance.
Value to be written to the HWREG_COL_END register.

simplesect.para: None

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the value of the HWREG_COL_END hardware register for the specified XV_letterbox instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function asserts that the provided instance pointer is not NULL and that the instance is ready before reading the register value from the hardware. The value read from the HWREG_COL_END register is then returned to the caller.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_letterbox instance for which the HWREG_COL_END register value is to be retrieved.

simplesect.para: The value of the HWREG_COL_END hardware register.

briefdescription.para: Sets the hardware register value for the row start parameter of the XV_letterbox instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function writes the specified row start value to the hardware register associated with the XV_letterbox core. It first asserts that the instance pointer is not NULL and that the instance is ready before performing the register write.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XV_letterbox instance.
The row start value to be written to the hardware register.

simplesect.para: None.

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the value of the HWREG_ROW_START hardware register from the XV_letterbox instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads the current row start configuration from the hardware register associated with the XV_letterbox peripheral.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_letterbox instance. It must be a valid pointer to an initialized XV_letterbox structure.

simplesect.para: The value of the HWREG_ROW_START register as a 32-bit unsigned integer.
The function asserts that InstancePtr is not NULL and that the instance is ready before accessing the hardware register.

briefdescription.para: Sets the hardware register value for the row end parameter of the XV_letterbox instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function writes the specified row end value to the hardware register associated with the XV_letterbox core. It first asserts that the instance pointer is not NULL and that the instance is ready before performing the register write.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XV_letterbox instance.
The row end value to be written to the hardware register.

simplesect.para: None.

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the value of the HWREG_ROW_END hardware register from the XV_letterbox instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads the current row end configuration from the hardware register associated with the XV_letterbox peripheral.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_letterbox instance. It must be a valid pointer to an initialized XV_letterbox structure.

simplesect.para: The value of the HWREG_ROW_END register as a 32-bit unsigned integer.
The function asserts that InstancePtr is not NULL and that the instance is ready before accessing the hardware register.

briefdescription.para: XV_letterbox_Set_HwReg_Y_R_value - Sets the Y register value for the hardware register in the XV_letterbox instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function asserts that the provided instance pointer is not NULL and that the instance is ready before writing the specified data value to the HWREG_Y_R register using the XV_letterbox_WriteReg function.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XV_letterbox instance. Must not be NULL and must be initialized.
The 32-bit value to be written to the HWREG_Y_R register.

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the value of the HWREG_Y_R hardware register from the XV_letterbox instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads the current Y (or R) value from the hardware register associated with the XV_letterbox peripheral. It asserts that the instance pointer is not NULL and that the instance is ready before accessing the hardware register.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_letterbox instance. It must be a valid pointer to an initialized XV_letterbox structure.

simplesect.para: The value of the HWREG_Y_R register as a 32-bit unsigned integer.

briefdescription.para: XV_letterbox_Set_HwReg_Cb_G_value - Sets the Cb/G register value for the hardware register in the XV_letterbox instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function writes the specified data value to the HWREG_CB_G register of the XV_letterbox hardware. It asserts that the provided instance pointer is not NULL and that the instance is ready before performing the register write operation.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XV_letterbox instance. Must not be NULL and must be initialized.
The 32-bit value to be written to the HWREG_CB_G register.

simplesect.para: None

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the value of the HWREG_CB_G register from the XV_letterbox hardware instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads the register value from the hardware using the base address specified in the configuration structure of the provided XV_letterbox instance pointer.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_letterbox instance. It must be initialized and ready before calling this function.

simplesect.para: The 32-bit value read from the HWREG_CB_G register.

briefdescription.para: XV_letterbox_Set_HwReg_Cr_B_value - Set the value of the HWREG_CR_B register for the XV_letterbox instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function writes the specified data value to the HWREG_CR_B register of the XV_letterbox hardware. It first asserts that the provided instance pointer is not NULL and that the instance is ready for use. The function then writes the data to the hardware register using the base address from the configuration structure.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XV_letterbox instance.
Value to be written to the HWREG_CR_B register.

simplesect.para: None.

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the value of the HWREG_CR_B register from the XV_letterbox instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads the current value of the HWREG_CR_B hardware register associated with the XV_letterbox peripheral. It asserts that the instance pointer is not NULL and that the instance is ready before accessing the hardware register.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_letterbox instance. It must be a valid pointer to an initialized XV_letterbox structure.

simplesect.para: The value of the HWREG_CR_B register as a 32-bit unsigned integer.

briefdescription.para: XV_letterbox_InterruptGlobalEnable - Enables global interrupts for the XV_letterbox hardware core.

detaileddescription.para: This function asserts that the provided InstancePtr is not NULL and that the hardware component is ready. It writes to the global interrupt enable register to allow interrupt generation by the hardware.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XV_letterbox instance.

simplesect.para: None.

briefdescription.para: XV_letterbox_InterruptGlobalDisable - Disables global interrupts for the XV_letterbox hardware core.

detaileddescription.para: This function asserts that the provided InstancePtr is not NULL and that the hardware component is ready. It writes to the global interrupt enable register to disable interrupt generation by the hardware.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XV_letterbox instance.

simplesect.para: None.

briefdescription.para: Enables the specified interrupts for the XV_letterbox instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads the current interrupt enable register, applies the given mask to enable the specified interrupts, and writes the updated value back to the register. It asserts that the instance pointer is not NULL and that the instance is ready before performing any operations.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_letterbox instance.
is the bitmask of interrupts to enable. Each bit in the mask corresponds to a specific interrupt source.

simplesect.para: None

briefdescription.para: XV_letterbox_InterruptDisable - Disables specific interrupts for the XV_letterbox instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function disables the interrupts specified by the Mask parameter for the given XV_letterbox instance. It reads the current interrupt enable register, clears the bits corresponding to the Mask, and writes the updated value back to the register. The function asserts that the InstancePtr is not NULL and that the instance is ready before performing the operation.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XV_letterbox instance.
Bitmask of interrupts to disable.

simplesect.para: None

briefdescription.para: XV_letterbox_InterruptClear - Clears specific interrupts for the XV_letterbox instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function writes the specified Mask to the interrupt status register to clear the corresponding interrupt sources for the given XV_letterbox instance. It asserts that the InstancePtr is not NULL and that the instance is ready before performing the operation.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XV_letterbox instance.
Bitmask of interrupts to clear.

simplesect.para: None.

briefdescription.para: XV_letterbox_InterruptGetEnabled - Retrieves the currently enabled interrupts for the XV_letterbox instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function asserts that the provided InstancePtr is not NULL and that the instance is ready. It reads the interrupt enable register and returns its value, indicating which interrupts are currently enabled for the hardware core.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XV_letterbox instance.

simplesect.para: The value of the interrupt enable register as a 32-bit unsigned integer.

briefdescription.para: XV_letterbox_InterruptGetStatus - Retrieves the current interrupt status for the XV_letterbox instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function asserts that the provided InstancePtr is not NULL and that the instance is ready. It reads the interrupt status register and returns its value, indicating which interrupts are currently active for the hardware core.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XV_letterbox instance.

simplesect.para: The value of the interrupt status register as a 32-bit unsigned integer.
